requirement_topic.zh: 电子 CRS 下的移动电源
requirement_topic.zht: 電子 CRS 下的行動電源

summary.en: India's CRS product list includes "Power Banks for use in portable applications" under the Electronics and IT Goods registration framework. Before importing China-origin power banks for sale in India, the manufacturer/importer should confirm the current product name, standard reference, implementation date, model-family grouping, BIS registration number, and Standard Mark labelling. The legal trigger is the notified CRS framework and registration condition; the referenced standard is a conformity benchmark or voluntary presumption route unless incorporated by the applicable order or registration condition.
summary.zh: 印度 CRS 产品清单在电子与信息技术产品注册框架下列有“便携式应用移动电源”。从中国进口移动电源在印度销售前，制造商/进口商应确认现行产品名称、标准引用、实施日期、型号族分组、BIS 注册号及标准标志标签。法律触发点是被通知的 CRS 框架及注册条件；被引用标准属于符合性基准或自愿符合性推定路径，除非被适用命令或注册条件纳入。
summary.zht: 印度 CRS 產品清單在電子與資訊技術產品登記框架下列有「便攜式應用行動電源」。從中國進口行動電源在印度銷售前，製造商/進口商應確認現行產品名稱、標準引用、實施日期、型號族分組、BIS 登記號及標準標誌標籤。法律觸發點是被通知的 CRS 框架及登記條件；被引用標準屬於符合性基準或自願符合性推定路徑，除非被適用命令或登記條件納入。

standards_or_laws: Electronics and Information Technology Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) Orders — mandatory legal basis for notified CRS goods
BIS CRS product list entry: Power Banks for use in portable applications
IS 13252 (Part 1) — power-bank CRS technical conformity benchmark / voluntary presumption route unless incorporated

summary.en: China power banks are commonly documented with GB 4943.1 / GB 31241 / EMC and CCC-related evidence where applicable. These reports may address product safety or battery safety for China, but they are not equivalent to an Indian CRS registration for the power-bank product category.
summary.zh: 中国移动电源通常持有 GB 4943.1 / GB 31241 / EMC 及适用时的 CCC 相关证据。这些报告可能覆盖中国的产品安全或电池安全，但不等同于印度移动电源产品类别的 CRS 注册。
summary.zht: 中國行動電源通常持有 GB 4943.1 / GB 31241 / EMC 及適用時的 CCC 相關證據。這些報告可能覆蓋中國的產品安全或電池安全，但不等同於印度行動電源產品類別的 CRS 登記。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — China audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety basis
GB 31241 — China portable lithium cell and battery safety basis
CCC — China domestic certification where applicable

gap.en: The power-bank gap is that the finished product, not only the internal cell, must be mapped to the Indian CRS category. The importer should confirm whether the battery cell/pack and the finished power bank require separate CRS registrations, and ensure model numbers, ratings, USB/charging ports, enclosure, adaptor bundling, and Standard Mark placement match the BIS file.
gap.zh: 移动电源差距在于必须将成品而不仅是内部电芯映射至印度 CRS 类别。进口商应确认电芯/电池组与成品移动电源是否需要分别注册 CRS，并确保型号、额定值、USB/充电端口、外壳、适配器捆绑及标准标志位置与 BIS 文件一致。
gap.zht: 行動電源差距在於必須將成品而不僅是內部電芯映射至印度 CRS 類別。進口商應確認電芯/電池組與成品行動電源是否需要分別登記 CRS，並確保型號、額定值、USB/充電端口、外殼、適配器捆綁及標準標誌位置與 BIS 文件一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation when the power bank falls within the notified CRS product entry and registration conditions; IS 13252 (Part 1) is a voluntary presumption or conformity benchmark unless incorporated by law or registration condition.
mandatory_status.cn: China finished-product and battery reports do not substitute for India CRS registration for power banks.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks for portable applications are an Electronics CRS product category. Treat the finished power bank and the internal lithium battery evidence as linked but separate compliance mapping tasks for India import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】便携式应用移动电源属于电子 CRS 产品类别。印度进口时，应将成品移动电源与内部锂电池证据视为相互关联但需分别映射的合规任务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】便攜式應用行動電源屬於電子 CRS 產品類別。印度進口時，應將成品行動電源與內部鋰電池證據視為相互關聯但需分別映射的合規任務。

source.publisher: Bureau of Indian Standards / Compulsory Registration Scheme
